final_response: Three open followups, all overdue — top of the list is the SOC2 evidence package from Karen at Acme Compliance (sent 2026-03-30, chased once on 2026-04-08, no reply, and the May auditor window is now active); then the Q2 budget review from Marcus in finance (expected 2026-04-25) and the Nimbus wifi demo schedule (expected 2026-04-23), both ~3 weeks past with no chase recorded. Want me to draft chase messages, starting with SOC2?
